name: Grilled Shrimp with Lemon & Chive Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 large Red pepper, seeded and cut in half
1 large Sweet Italian pepper, seeded and cut in half
1 medium Sweet or Vidalia onion, peeled and quartered
4 oz BLACK OLIVES, pitted and cut in half
16 oz LEMON & CHIVE PASTA, cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine SEAFOOD MARINADE, white wine, cut peppers, and onion with shrimp. Refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight.
2. Preheat grill or broiler. Cook peppers and onions until done (about 15 minutes).
3. Grill shrimp for 2 minutes on each side, brushing with SEAFOOD MARINADE.
4. Cut grilled peppers and onions into strips. Cut grilled shrimp into quarters.
5. Toss shrimp, peppers, onion, FETA CHEESE, BLACK OLIVES, LEMON & CHIVE PASTA, and lemon juice together, adding some of the SEAFOOD MARINADE.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
